title: Sanctuary
description: A 1.20.1 Kitchen Sink Origin and adventure ModPack!
body:
![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AAYZ5qDA/images/817c73fbfaafaf40e427f3d90c79e95da4a9c574.png) ## Sanctuary Modpack A 1.20.1 Remake of the [Sanctuary Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/alpheas-sanctuary) Originally designed for my community it has now expanded into a standalone experience and actively maintained server. It's primarily designed for exploration and creation however does have combat elements, Origins as well lore. With a variety of quality of life visual enhancements and performance boosters I'm sure you'll find at least some enjoyment.
Feedback
